# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor

## Checks

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q src tests`
- [ ] `ar doctor`
- [ ] Live smoke test, if OpenViking behavior changed

## Notes

Mention any follow-up work, risks, or intentionally deferred changes.
